channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 4 shops camberwell Church Street. Same tag, 15th July
item.description:
Day 1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubble and house waste, 15th July
item.description:
Waste is blocking pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hector Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another spate of tagging on camberwell Church Street, 15th July
item.description:
2 shops around no 78. Same tagger

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Douglas Road and Priory Park Road, 15th July
item.description:
Pots, pans, boxes, bags.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Needs cleaning, 15th July
item.description:
Reporting again as this has not been solved. Totally discussing, never cleaned. The whole road is covered with rubbish. Bramble Croft car park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bramble Croft, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racist vandalism, 15th July
item.description:
There is racist scrawling a over one of the toilet cubicles at Dulwich Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carriage Drive, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole with water, 15th July
item.description:
The original pothole has been repaired but even in this heat there is a build up of water constantly and the original repair has now sunken. Vehicles driving by especially buses often cause a spray onto the pavement. I believe the cause is a leak that has undermined the original repair.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): White Horse Hill, Chislehurst
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chimney pot dumped, 15th July
item.description:
Coukd it be taken away please? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monnow Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposts attached the traffic lights, 15th July
item.description:
Flyposts are attached to traffic lights around the entirety of the junction underneath the motorway. Please can these be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colchester Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting and swings/slides need clean, 15th July
item.description:
Cut grass and clean swings/slides of bird poo. Been like this for a few months. The park near Harris Primary Orpington
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finucane Drive, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed glass everywhere, 15th July
item.description:
Glass pieces all over the cycle lane. Going to cause a puncture/accident. Needs a mobile sweeper to pick up all the shards.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lambeth Bridge, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant overflowing waste, flies and odour, 15th July
item.description:
Flytipping and constantly overflowing waste at top of Farquhar Rd in Lambeth. Health and safety issue - rotting meat from restaurants.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farquhar Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bikes, 15th July
item.description:
Abandoned bikes at least 4 on the pavement of Woolwich rd on the corner of Charlton church lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gallon Close, Charlton Riverside, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found, 15th July
item.description:
A Fly-tip Medium - 4 to 9 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: Dead animal road, 15th July
item.description:
There is a dress animal on the corner of Pilkington Road and Godman Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pilkington Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 15th July
item.description:
I see there has been a report already on Monday but no action has yet been taken to remove the body. The poor thing is now being eaten by the magpies and covered in maggots. This is not acceptable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped bin bags, 15th July
item.description:
Fly tipped bin bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bramblebury Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
